setup: Chain: Robinhood (4663) — Bankr wallet must support Robinhood
Deploy: preflight-deploy → haiku captcha JWT + POST /api/deploy (server pays gas)
Buy/sell: token-info (V3 vs Pro) → Pro: prepare-buy|prepare-sell → Bankr submit chainId 4663
Simple (V3) tokens: trade on Uniswap — see streaming-hints.json and token-info
Claim fees: haiku JWT + POST /api/agent/claim (server pays gas)
Validate swap txs per references/TX-VALIDATION.md and known-contracts.json
